title: [Immersive Vehicles] Syndicate Motor Foundry
description: Immersive Vehicles content pack adding cyberpunk-like vehicles and parts
body:
Syndicate Motor Foundry is a content pack for [Immersive Vehicles](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles) featuring a new brand of vehicles and parts based on the common conventions already set by [UNU by Dr_prof_luigi](https://modrinth.com/mod/unu-parts-pack).

Huge thanks to Laura from [DKZ Industries](https://modrinth.com/mod/dkz-industries)! Without them, this would never have been possible!
![This pack uses Quality UNU Parts!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56646074d67f177fdb91cad48a2bb10ecbc41873.png)
